assignment_description:
➜ OBSERVE
Begin observations in the field: use your field notebook, collect specimens when allowed, and take pictures where helpful. Begin building a rock, mineral, and/or fossil collection.

➜ OBSERVE
Continue observations in the field. Sketch, describe, and document your local geology.

➜ OBSERVE
Continue observations in the field. Sketch, describe, and document your local geology.

➜ OBSERVE
When you are driving around, start noticing where there are exposed rocks in your landscape. Take note of road beds that had to be cut out of the ground. Make observations of what you are seeing in your notebook. Include sketches when you are able. If there are any rivers, creeks, streams, etc. nearby, observe what sort of soil/rock has been exposed in the banks.

➜ OBSERVE
Continue observations in the field. Sketch, describe, and document your local geology.
